name: Barker Farms
description: Come play pickleball at Barker Farms in Menasha, WI! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Lake Park Swim & Fitness
description: Follow Lake Park Swim & Fitness on Facebook or call (920) 882-8900 for information regarding court reservations, classes, clinics, private lessons, open play times, and more!
fees: Fee required — Cost per court is $8/hour, divided among all participants

name: Morrissey Park
description: Come play pickleball at Morrissey Park in Chilton, WI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Smith Park
description: Come play pickleball at Smith Park in Menasha, WI! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Wanick Choute Park
description: Come play pickleball at Wanick Choute Park in Sherwood, WI! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.
